title: ferray-ma: ufunc_support only covers a handful of ufuncs
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's ma module wraps ALL ufuncs automatically via _MaskedUnaryOperation and _MaskedBinaryOperation. Any numpy.ma.sin, numpy.ma.add etc. just works. ferray-ma's ufunc_support.rs manually wraps a subset of ufuncs (check which ones are implemented). Any ufunc not explicitly wrapped requires manual extract-data + operate + rebuild-mask. Either add a generic masked_unary/masked_binary helper that works with any ferray-ufunc function (via closures), or wrap all the common ones.
